name: 法玛斯 | 中士
descriptionEn: A cheap option for cash-strapped players, the FAMAS effectively fills the niche between more expensive rifles and the less-effective SMGs. It has been given a patina of varying depth using masking fluid to create a military motif, sealed with a satin finish. Lead by example
descriptionZh: 给手头紧的玩家的一个廉价选择，法玛斯有效地填补了昂贵的步枪和杀伤力较低的微型冲锋枪之间的空缺。 这把武器使用留白液附上了深浅不一的铜绿，以创造出军事风格的图案，然后通过缎面加工将其密封。 以身作则
